markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Close the block-as-app gap: saved block-collection views over Loom queries - table view (sortable typed columns from block fields/tags), Kanban (group by tag/field, drag = real field/tag mutation with receipt), calendar (by journal_date/created), each saved as a typed view definition block; all reads from real Loom query backend; mutations route through normal block update paths.
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.
Bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries only (Tiptap/Monaco precedent); no CDN; no external app launches as product behavior.
PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; UI artifacts are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle (v02.193), product code, tests, and receipts.

OPERATOR ORDER (DEC-007, 2026-06-12): NO scaffolding, templates, mock-ups, or vibecoding; every feature must be working AND tested in runtime (executed vitest/Playwright/real-PG proof per feature, not status text). A feature without an executed runtime proof is NOT done.
Kanban drag mutates the REAL underlying field/tag with receipt (proven), never view-local state.
View definitions are blocks (no parallel store).
scope.expected_behavior: Operator turns any tag/query into a table/Kanban/calendar that reads and writes real blocks.
acceptance_criteria: Each view type renders real query results (proven).
Kanban drag -> real tag/field change + receipt (proven).
Adversarial self-review recorded per the WP loop; findings fixed before evidence write.
verification: cargo test -p handshake_core --features runtime-full,test-utils (scoped) green with real-PG tests for backend state.
pnpm vitest run green; tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean.
Offline Playwright runtime proof for each named capability (zero external network requests).
handoff_requirements: List files changed, tests run with exact names/counts, commits.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence and Playwright artifacts produced.
List remaining risks and any honestly-documented deviations (e.g., prose multi-cursor approach).

evidence: commit 045929c5 on feat/WP-KERNEL-009 (migration 0335_loom_block_collection_views), zero .GOV; adversarial review 3/3 PASS, no blockers

runtime proof: 5 real-PG tests PASS — view_def block round-trips (content_type='view_def' + bridge row + EventLedger receipt); table sort correct across a PAGE BOUNDARY (proves SQL-side, not client-side over a partial page); Kanban drag performs a REAL field/tag mutation persisted to PG with LoomEdgeCreated/Deleted/LoomBlockUpdated receipts + fresh backend read; calendar buckets by real journal_date with date filter applied in SQL

vitest 3 (header-click sort persists via updateBlockView + re-queries the backend /results, not client state); offline Playwright 3 projects PASS (1280-light/390-dark/1024-nl) against a real PG-backed fixture; tsc + eslint clean

saved view IS a typed LoomBlock(content_type='view_def') with a dedicated view_definition_json column (migration 0335 + paired replay-safe .down + CHECK tying the column to view_def blocks); all reads from the real Loom query backend; mutations route through normal block update paths

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger and/or offline Playwright where the contract names durable state or GUI behavior.
